title: Shared-memory follow-up artifact
description: Trackable handoff task for downstream agents (skill-creator, doc-writer) produced when absorption classifies a candidate as promote_to_skill or promote_to_module_doc.

kind.description: The type of downstream work this handoff targets.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the follow-up task.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this artifact was first created.

sourceCandidate.description: Relative path to the inbox candidate that triggered this follow-up.

sourceAction.description: The absorption action that triggered this follow-up.

suggestedDestination.description: Recommended destination path for the downstream artifact.

title.description: Human-readable title for the follow-up task.

reason.description: Why this candidate was classified for this action.

evidence.description: Evidence snippets from the original candidate supporting the classification.

safeToAutoApply.description: Whether the downstream target action (skill/doc creation) is safe to auto-apply. Always false for follow-up artifacts.

handoffTo.description: The configured downstream authority responsible for completing this follow-up.

recommendedOutputs.description: Recommended output paths or deliverables for the downstream agent.

outputs.description: Completed output artifacts produced by the downstream agent.
